title: Assertion fault on SQL input
poc: CREATE  TEMPORARY  TABLE t2(mx_payload CONSTRAINT constr0 COLLATE NOCASE);
CREATE  TRIGGER  IF  NOT  EXISTS trig0 UPDATE  OF mx_payload, mx_payload, mx_payload, mx_payload, mx_payload ON t2 FOR  EACH  ROW  WHEN 0xffff BEGIN  VALUES ('');END ;

CREATE  TEMPORARY  TRIGGER  IF  NOT  EXISTS trig0 AFTER  DELETE  ON t2 FOR  EACH  ROW  WHEN  NULL  BEGIN  INSERT  INTO t2(mx_payload) VALUES (0xffff), ('') ON  CONFLICT  DO  NOTHING  RETURNING  FALSE  AS mx_payload;
INSERT  INTO t2(mx_payload) VALUES (''), (42e-300) ON  CONFLICT  DO  NOTHING  RETURNING  TRUE  AS mx_payload;
key_bug_features: IF NOT EXISTS trigger with multiple RETURNING clauses
bug_features_seed: CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE t1(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE t2(mx_payload INTEGER CONSTRAINT constr0 CHECK(mx_payload >= 0));
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS trig1 AFTER INSERT ON t1 FOR EACH ROW BEGIN INSERT INTO t2(mx_payload) VALUES (NEW.id);
INSERT INTO t2(mx_payload) VALUES (0), (1), (NULL), (42e-300) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING RETURNING mx_payload;
